summary: Made two surgical seam edits: the opening now hands off from chapter 08 with less duplicate staging, and the ending now places Tiana's document folder in the room before chapter 10 opens on it.
edits: Reframed the opening sentence and gate detail to preserve the dawn handoff from chapter 08 while reducing near-duplicate phrasing.
Added Tiana's blue document folder under the rice tin near the end of the chapter to bridge into chapter 10's opening image.
